name: biozar-app
description: BIOZAR - Console de Pilotage Bio Madagascar

scripts.build: npm run copy-web && npx cap sync
scripts.copy-web: node -e "const{cpSync,rmSync,existsSync}=require('fs');const{join}=require('path');const src=join(__dirname,'..','biozar','web');const dst=join(__dirname,'www');if(!existsSync(src)){console.error('Erreur: biozar/web/ introuvable');process.exit(1)}['index.html','chart.js','supabase-init.js','sw.js','version.json','manifest.json'].forEach(f=>cpSync(join(src,f),join(dst,f),{force:true}));const iconsDst=join(dst,'icons');if(existsSync(iconsDst))rmSync(iconsDst,{recursive:true});cpSync(join(src,'icons'),iconsDst,{recursive:true});console.log('✓ Web files synced from biozar/web/')

author: BIOZAR Madagascar
